conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point (CAP) of PEO block
conditions.evidence_text: Reversed phase LC at CAP of PEO allowed for oligomeric separation of triblock copolymers with regard to PPO block... Solvent A: Acetone/Water = 37/63 v/v, Solvent B: Methanol/Water = 87/13 v/v... column oven was maintained at 50[◦] C.
conditions.notes: Gradient elution used to separate PPO oligomers while PEO is at critical conditions.
conditions.physical_address: Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Republic of Korea

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point (CAP) of PPO block
conditions.evidence_text: Normal phase LC at CAP of PPO renders oligomeric separation with respect to PEO block... Isocratic separations at CAP of PPO were performed with mobile phase composition of acetonitrile/water = 80/20 v/v at a flow rate of 1.0 mL/min at 30[◦] C.
conditions.notes: Used for 1D separation of PEO oligomers. Also used as first dimension in 2D-LC with slightly different ratio (84/16) and flow rate (0.05 mL/min).
conditions.physical_address: Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Republic of Korea

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point (CAP) of PPO block (First Dimension of 2D-LC)
conditions.evidence_text: First dimensional setup... separation was realized on a Nucleosil, 5 m, 300 Å, 250 × 4.6 mm column at pe critical conditions of PPO while interaction conditions of PEO in acetonitrile/water = 84/16 v/v at a flow rate of 0.05 mL/min.
conditions.notes: First dimension of the comprehensive 2D-LC (IC x IC) setup. Temperature maintained at 30 C.
conditions.physical_address: Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Republic of Korea

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point (CAP) of PEO block (Second Dimension of 2D-LC)
conditions.evidence_text: Second dimension analysis... Pluronic-10R5 (2nd dimension conditions-methanol/water = 75/25 v/v at 1.0 mL/min, column oven temperature = 45[◦] C)... fairly critical conditions of PEO and adsorbing conditions of PPO.
conditions.notes: Second dimension of 2D-LC. Trapping columns used prior to analysis.
conditions.physical_address: Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Republic of Korea

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point (CAP) of PEO block (Second Dimension of 2D-LC)
conditions.evidence_text: Second dimension analysis... Pluronic-L35 (2nd dimension conditions-methanol/water = 80/20 v/v at 1.0 mL/min, column oven temperature = 40[◦] C)... fairly critical conditions of PEO and adsorbing conditions of PPO.
conditions.notes: Second dimension of 2D-LC. Trapping columns used prior to analysis.
conditions.physical_address: Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Republic of Korea

conditions.evidence_text: Second dimension analysis... Pluronic-1740 (2nd dimension conditions-methanol/water = 84/16 v/v at 1.1 mL/min, column oven temperature = 40[◦] C)... fairly critical conditions of PEO and adsorbing conditions of PPO.
